title: JSON Data Processor
prompt:
Write a Hemlock program using `@stdlib/json` to process JSON data. Import `parse` and `stringify` from @stdlib/json.

1. Parse this JSON string: '[{"name":"Alice","score":95},{"name":"Bob","score":72},{"name":"Charlie","score":88},{"name":"Diana","score":64},{"name":"Eve","score":91}]'
2. Filter to only entries with score >= 80
3. Sort the filtered results by score descending
4. For each result, print "NAME: SCORE"
5. Print the count: "passing: N"
